Precision Audio Engineering

Every Speaker.
One Truth.

Ever noticed how the same song sounds totally different depending on what speaker you're using? We noticed too. FreqSync is our attempt to fix that — making sure your music sounds the way it was meant to, no matter what you're listening on.

Add Your Speaker Explore Presets
Our Mission

Music the way the
artist intended

Every speaker system is unique. From the driver diameter and cabinet resonance to the DSP firmware baked into your Bluetooth earbuds — each device imparts its own tonal signature onto every song you play.

FreqSync builds a precision frequency profile for your specific speaker hardware, then intelligently applies real-time correction so that a snare hit lands exactly as the recording engineer heard it in the studio.

Whether you're mixing on studio monitors, listening on a portable Bluetooth speaker, or comparing tracks across an entire sound system, FreqSync keeps every playback device honest.

±0.2dB
Target frequency tolerance after sync
20Hz–
20kHz
Full audible spectrum correction

The People Behind the Sound

Meet the team

We're a group of students at our first hackathon, trying to build something that actually helps people. We bonded over a shared frustration — music that sounds great in one place and terrible in another — and decided to do something about it.
